creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Patch to update games/assaultcube port from 1.1.0.4 to 1.2.0.0 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://assault.cubers.net/docs/history.html

Also changed launcher scripts and removed the need to create symlinks for data files (as games/redeclipse port's maintainer did).

Added STAGEDIR support.

Tested on GCC v4.2 and v4.8, Clang v3.3 (including with "-std=c++11" compiler option).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
